title: phlomoides congesta
intro: Phlomoides congesta, also known as Jerusalem sage, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its compact, shrub-like growth and aromatic foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Phlomoides congesta include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. Phlomoides congesta can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in aromatherapy and as a culinary herb.
